title: parallax daemon-interface contract
_doc: Second frozen contract after the data schemas. Agrees on config discovery, canonical subcommands, and exit-code semantics — the minimal invocation surface a cross-conformance suite can assert on. With this + the data schemas, either team's suite can fairly invoke either team's daemon.

config_discovery.method: PARALLAX_HOME env var, falling back to nearest-ancestor-of-cwd containing partners.json, falling back to script-relative
config_discovery.PARALLAX_HOME: environment variable pointing to the sync home directory (where partners.json, sync_ledger.json, embargo_registry.json live)
config_discovery.fallback_1: walk up from cwd until a directory containing partners.json is found (stop at filesystem root)
config_discovery.fallback_2: use the directory containing _sync.py as the sync home (script-relative)
config_discovery.rationale: neither script-relative nor cwd-relative alone is portable across repos and conformance harnesses

detect.description: find new partner commits, classify, draft ledger entry

prepare.description: generate reaction template from draft ledger entry

relay.description: verify working tree clean; stage paths for partner relay. No paths = check all. Exit 1 if dirty docs.

count.description: non-blocking status report (commit count since last sync)

guard.description: exit 1 if path is inside any partner repo (read-guard enforcement)

canonical_subcommands.aliases: status→count, check-relay→relay, check-read-guard→guard (accepted but not advertised; conformance suites invoke canonical names only)

exit_codes.rationale: suite checks exit codes + file effects (ledger written, quarantine populated, subject redacted). NEVER checks daemon output wording.

assert_on: file effects (ledger entry written, quarantine populated)
subject absence (embargoed commit subjects not present in any output)
conformance_suite_rules.cannot_invoke: a daemon that errors before reaching behaviour (config not found, missing dependency) is scored as 'cannot invoke', not 'failed'
conformance_suite_rules.fairness: either team's suite must be able to invoke either team's daemon. The judge = whichever suite has higher coverage after both are hardened
